description: Analyze the Mauna Loa CO2 record from ~/Documents/GeoGebra/data/co2_mlo_monthly.csv to separate the long-term trend from the seasonal cycle and forecast future levels. Use 'decimal date' (Column C) for the x-axis and 'average' (Column E) for the y-axis. Create a model Trend(x) for the long-term rise and a model Cycle(x) for the annual oscillation, then combine them into a single Model(x). Create a point named 'Prediction' that forecasts the CO2 level for May 2030 (x ≈ 2030.375) using your combined model. Save the project as ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/co2_analysis.ggb.
